Ahmed Mohamed Hossam

Lead Cost Control Engineer / MBA / Infrastructure Project Controls & Power BI

Ten years across highways, ports and breakwaters, wastewater treatment plants and pump stations in Saudi Arabia and Egypt. Beyond running cost control, I build the reporting systems themselves — end-to-end Power BI platforms that track delivery on a daily cycle instead of a monthly close.

Case study · Selected capability

The Daily Performance System

Problem

Cost and schedule deviations surfaced only at the monthly close — by then, corrective action was expensive and margin was already eroding.

Approach

Built a governed star-schema model in Power BI consolidating BOQ, budget, commitments, actual cost (SAP/Oracle), progress and manpower, with a live EVM engine in DAX.

Result

Cost and progress deviations now surface within 24 hours, with Board, Discipline and Cost-code views framed around decisions, not raw data.

Interactive demo below uses illustrative sample data; EAC/ETC values are masked. Real production screens follow in the next section.

Cumulative S-curve
● Planned● Actual
Cost variance by discipline
Live dashboards · Built in Power BI

The system in production

Screens from the daily performance platform running on the Projects — a governed star-schema model with a live EVM engine in DAX, refreshing every day. Board, discipline and cost-code views, all framed around decisions rather than raw data.

Absolute contract values are masked to respect client confidentiality; structure, ratios and logic are as built.

Daily Progress Overview — Plan vs. Actual DAX · EVM engine

Monthly and daily targets versus achieved-to-date at portfolio and discipline level, with variance and per-discipline achieved %. The daily bar strip tracks achieved vs. daily target across the month, and a live CPI is computed daily — surfacing slippage the moment it happens instead of at the monthly close.

Cumulative Collection — Plan vs. Actual S-curve Time intelligence

Multi-year cash collection including O&M — cumulative plan, actual and target curves with monthly bars, spanning four fiscal years with a year selector. Built on DAX time-intelligence over the project baseline.

Portfolio Project Journey — 11-Stage Status Executive view

A single-screen executive read across the full delivery lifecycle — contract, engineering, procurement, planning, HSE, quality, risk, cost, execution and financials — each stage carrying its own KPI, progress bar and on-track / at-risk / delayed status pill.
